pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh explicitly specify and check this path.
Downloaded SampleDivesV2.ssrf directly from the source repository and parsed the XML. There are exactly 29 <dive> elements in the file, contradicting the script comment and metadata claim of 8 dives.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to export the open dive log as an SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/dives_database.sqlite. The data is real dive data sourced from SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface repository. Although the task metadata and install script claim there are 8 dives, parsing the actual XML file reveals it contains exactly 29 dives.
